notes: Boron carbide (B4C). Density 2.52 g/cm³ — lightest armor ceramic. Knoop hardness ~3700 HK (30 GPa) — hardest ceramic. RHAe ~5-6 per mm vs KE. Used in M1A2 SEP v2 turret behind DU inserts. Highest areal density efficiency but most expensive. Degrades under extremely high pressure (shock-induced amorphization at ~25 GPa). Fracture toughness K1c ~2.5-3.5 MPa·m^½.
